title: How a man of God leads when it costs him
caption:
The version of leadership you got from the world: authority, volume, being the guy who decides.

The version Christ modeled: the first one in, the last one out, the one who takes the hit so someone else doesn't have to.

You're not leading if you're not absorbing cost. You're just standing at the front of the room.

"For even the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many." — Mark 10:45

Start with the room you're already in. The team, the friendship, the home. Lead there first.

—

Comment "serve" and I'll send you the link.

#faith #godlymen #leadership #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #disciplineequalsfreedom
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
